Modern CSS Color Contrast Audit Test

This test page evaluates computed style extraction for modern CSS formats.

Tailwind Space-Separated Syntax

This text has high contrast and uses space-separated rgb syntax. It should pass.

OKLCH Syntax

This text has high contrast and uses OKLCH color space syntax. It should pass.

Transparency Compositing

This text has transparency and is composited over white. It should pass.

Contrast Violation

This text has very low contrast (dark on dark) using space-separated values. It must fail!
